purpose: VWO_CLIENT_SKILL.md validation seed — 3 sample emails the operator confirmed are correct. Phase 9 prompt regressions get caught when these stop validating.

samples.context: D2C Apparel, CMO, Tier A, axis 2 + axis 1. Lead posted on LinkedIn 14 days ago about tier-2/3 acquisition needing different creative.

body1MustContain: Often, these don't require a full redesign. Even small, validated changes can create measurable improvements.

research.observationAngle: your homepage hero on andaazwear.example serves one creative variant for all geographies
research.valueAngle: lift CR 8-12% in 6 weeks via geo-personalised hero
research.socialAngle: your post on tier-2/3 needing different creative resonates
evidenceList: Recent LinkedIn post on tier-2/3 acquisition
personEvidence: Posted 14 days ago on tier-2/3 creative differentiation
